mapper.select: SELECT child.CMM_SN, child.CMM_PARENT_SN, child.CMM_CD, child.CMM_NM, child.CMM_EXPLN, child.CMM_SORT_NO, child.CMM_USE_YN FROM CMM_CODE child JOIN CMM_CODE parent ON parent.CMM_SN = child.CMM_PARENT_SN WHERE parent.CMM_CD = #{groupCode} AND parent.CMM_USE_YN = 'Y' AND child.CMM_CD = #{code} AND child.CMM_USE_YN = 'Y' LIMIT 1

SELECT child.CMM_SN, child.CMM_PARENT_SN, child.CMM_CD, child.CMM_NM, child.CMM_EXPLN, child.CMM_SORT_NO, child.CMM_USE_YN FROM CMM_CODE child JOIN CMM_CODE parent ON parent.CMM_SN = child.CMM_PARENT_SN WHERE parent.CMM_CD = #{groupCode} AND parent.CMM_USE_YN = 'Y' AND child.CMM_USE_YN = 'Y' ORDER BY child.CMM_SORT_NO, child.CMM_SN
